title: Preview Artifact Overrides
description: Studio must preview and diff **unsaved** delta edits without writing to disk. This extends workspace [`core:preview-spec`](../../../../../../specs/core/preview-spec/spec.md) with optional in-memory overrides keyed by change-directory `filename`.
context: Studio must preview and diff **unsaved** delta edits without writing to disk. This extends workspace [`core:preview-spec`](../../../../../../specs/core/preview-spec/spec.md) with optional in-memory overrides keyed by change-directory `filename`.

rules: `PreviewSpecInput` MAY include `artifactOverrides?: Readonly<Record<string, string>>` mapping change-relative filename → content string.

rules.requirement: override replaces disk read for matching files
rules: When processing an `ArtifactFile` whose `filename` exists in `artifactOverrides`, `PreviewSpec` MUST use the override string as artifact content and MUST NOT call `ChangeRepository.artifact` for that file.
Files without an override MUST continue to load from the change repository (or record missing per existing rules).

rules.requirement: overrides do not mutate manifest or disk
rules: Applying overrides MUST be read-only with respect to persistence; no save, no `updatedAt` bump.

scenarios.name: PreviewSpec input accepts artifactOverrides — primary path
when: PreviewSpecInput MAY include artifactOverrides?: Readonly<Record<string, string>> mapping change-relative
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: PreviewSpec input accepts artifactOverrides — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented

scenarios.requirement: override replaces disk read for matching files
scenarios.name: Draft delta changes merged output
given: saved delta on disk would merge to A
AND override content would merge to B
when: PreviewSpec runs with override for that delta filename
then: AND disk delta was not read

scenarios.requirement: override replaces disk read for matching files
scenarios.name: Override for new spec path
then: merged entry uses override as full content
AND base is null for new spec

scenarios.name: non-overridden files unchanged — primary path
when: Files without an override MUST continue to load
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: non-overridden files unchanged — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented

scenarios.requirement: overrides do not mutate manifest or disk
scenarios.name: Preview with overrides is read-only
then: AND artifact files on disk are unchanged
